title: All-In x Kill Tony: A Hilarious Holiday Special
description:
(0:00) Intro!

(2:47) Tony Hinchcliffe roasts the Besties

(15:01) Interview: Kill Tony success, MSG rally, origin story, free speech in Europe

(36:03) The Besties play Kill Tony!

(50:14) The 2025 Bestie Awards: Business, Politics, Tech, and more

Thanks to our partners for making this happen!

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast hosts a hilarious holiday special with Tony Hinchcliffe, discussing his success with Kill Tony, free speech in Europe, and playing a game. They also give out the 2025 Bestie Awards in various categories. The episode is filled with humor and lighthearted conversations.

takeaways.text: Tony Hinchcliffe's Kill Tony has been successful
Free speech is a concern in Europe
The 2025 Bestie Awards were given out
The episode was a lighthearted holiday special
The hosts discussed various topics including business and politics
Tony Hinchcliffe was roasted by the Besties
The episode featured multiple games and awards

sentiment.notes: The episode was lighthearted and humorous, with a focus on entertainment and comedy. The hosts and guest had a positive and playful tone throughout the episode.
